queries.name: Student Classes By Term
queries.description: Get each student enrolled for the term and all of their valid classes.

queries.name: Student Hours By Term
queries.description: Get each student enrolled for the term and their total hours enrolled.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_CRN
columns.description: This field identifies the course reference number associated with the class section.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_PIDM
columns.description: Internal Identification Number of the person registered.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_TERM_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the registration term code.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_CLASS_SORT_KEY
columns.description: This field identifies the class of the registrant.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_REG_SEQ
columns.description: This field identifies the sequence in which the student enrolled in the associated class section.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_PTRM_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the part-of-term code associated with this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_RSTS_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the course registration status associated with this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_RSTS_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies the date associated with the course registration status of this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_ERROR_FLAG
columns.description: This field identifies an error associated with the registration of this CRN. Valid values are F=Fatal, D=Do not count in enrollment, L=WaitListed, O=Override, W=Warning, X=Delete (used only by SFRSTCR POSTUPDATE DB trigger).

columns.name: SFRSTCR_MESSAGE
columns.description: This field identifies a message associated with the registration of the CRN

columns.name: SFRSTCR_BILL_HR
columns.description: This field identifies the billing hours associated with this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_WAIV_HR
columns.description: This field identifies the waived hours associated with this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_CREDIT_HR
columns.description: This field identifies the credit hours associated with this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_BILL_HR_HOLD
columns.description: This field identifies the billing hours to hold for reinstatements.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_CREDIT_HR_HOLD
columns.description: This field identifies the credit hours to hold for reinstatements.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_GMOD_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the grade mode associated with this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_GRDE_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the grade code associated with this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_GRDE_CODE_MID
columns.description: This field identifies the mid-term grade code associated with this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_GRDE_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies the date associated with the grade of this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_DUPL_OVER
columns.description: This field identifies the duplicate course override of this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_LINK_OVER
columns.description: This field identifies the link override of this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_CORQ_OVER
columns.description: This field identifies the corequisite override of this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_PREQ_OVER
columns.description: This field identifies the prerequisite override of this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_TIME_OVER
columns.description: This field identifies the time conflict override of this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_CAPC_OVER
columns.description: This field identifies the capacity override of this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_LEVL_OVER
columns.description: This field identifies the level restriction override of this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_COLL_OVER
columns.description: This field identifies the college restriction override of this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_MAJR_OVER
columns.description: This field identifies the major restriction override of this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_CLAS_OVER
columns.description: This field identifies the class restriction override of this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_APPR_OVER
columns.description: This field identifies the special approval override of this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_APPR_RECEIVED_IND
columns.description: This field identifies the special approval received indicator for this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_ADD_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies the add date of the registrant in this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies the most current date record was created or updated.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_LEVL_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the level the registrant is enrolled for this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_CAMP_CODE
columns.description: This field identifies the campus code of this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_RESERVED_KEY
columns.description: Student Course Registration Table Reserved Key.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_ATTEND_HR
columns.description: This column contains the number of hours the student attended this class

columns.name: SFRSTCR_REPT_OVER
columns.description: This field identifies the repeat course restriction override of the CRN

columns.name: SFRSTCR_RPTH_OVER
columns.description: This field identifies the repeat course hour restriction override of the CRN

columns.name: SFRSTCR_TEST_OVER
columns.description: This field identifies the test score restriction override of the CRN

columns.name: SFRSTCR_CAMP_OVER
columns.description: The Campus Registration Restriction override code

columns.name: SFRSTCR_USER
columns.description: Identifies the user who entered the registration request.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_DEGC_OVER
columns.description: Degree restriction override indicator

columns.name: SFRSTCR_PROG_OVER
columns.description: Program restriction override indicator

columns.name: SFRSTCR_LAST_ATTEND
columns.description: Date student last attended this class

columns.name: SFRSTCR_GCMT_CODE
columns.description: GRADE COMMENT CODE: This field indicates the grade comment (result code) for the section.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_DATA_ORIGIN
columns.description: DATA SOURCE: Source system that created or updated the row

columns.name: SFRSTCR_ASSESS_ACTIVITY_DATE
columns.description: This field identifies the date when registration activity impacting Fee Assessment occurred. This date is used in flat charge refunding to determine courses that have been updated since the student's last assessment.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_DEPT_OVER
columns.description: DEPARTMENT OVERRIDE: This field identifies the department restriction override of this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_ATTS_OVER
columns.description: STUDENT ATTRIBUTE OVERRIDE: This field identifies the student attribute restriction override of this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_CHRT_OVER
columns.description: COHORT OVERRIDE: This field identifies the cohort restriction override of this CRN.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_RMSG_CDE
columns.description: MESSAGE CODE: Specifies the type of error message.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_WL_PRIORITY
columns.description: WAITLIST PRIORITY: The Waitlist priority.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_WL_PRIORITY_ORIG
columns.description: PRIORITY ORIGIN: Waitlist priority origin. Valid values are S-system originated, M-manually originated.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_GRDE_CODE_INCMP_FINAL
columns.description: INCOMPLETE FINAL DEFAULT GRADE CODE: Grade code to identify default final grade for incomplete coursework.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_INCOMPLETE_EXT_DATE
columns.description: INCOMPLETE DEFAULT EXTENSION DATE: Date to identify when the default final grade will be applied to academic history if coursework is incomplete.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_MEXC_OVER
columns.description: MUTUAL EXCLUSION OVERRIDE: This field identifies the mutual exclusion restriction override of this CRN

columns.name: SFRSTCR_STSP_KEY_SEQUENCE
columns.description: STUDY PATH SEQUENCE: Key sequence of the study path under which the CRN is registered.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_BRDH_SEQ_NUM
columns.description: BLOCK RULE SEQUENCE NUMBER: Sequence number that uniquely identifies the rule for block assignment.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_BLCK_CODE
columns.description: BLOCK: Block code student is registered.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_SURROGATE_ID
columns.description: SURROGATE ID: Immutable unique key

columns.name: SFRSTCR_VERSION
columns.description: VERSION: Optimistic lock token.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_USER_ID
columns.description: USER ID: The user ID of the person who inserted or last updated this record.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_VPDI_CODE
columns.description: VPDI CODE: Multi-entity processing code.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_STRH_SEQNO
columns.description: STRUCTURED REGISTRATION HEADER SEQUENCE NUMBER: The Unique Id of the Structured Registration Header Record which contains type of requirement and program.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_STRD_SEQNO
columns.description: STRUCTURED REGISTRATION SEQUENCE NUMBER: The Unique Id within the Structured Registration Program and Requirement for the requirement detail.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_SESSIONID
columns.description: SESSIONID: The session id value for the registration.

columns.name: SFRSTCR_CURRENT_TIME
columns.description: CURRENT TIME: The current time of the registration.
